rules.natural_language_rule: The system initializes a predefined list of customer keys used for random lookup.
Each customer key in the key table is processed sequentially to perform random access reads.

rules.cobol_snippet: READ CUSTFile RECORD KEY IS CUSTFile-Cust-ID
rules.natural_language_rule: Customer records are retrieved using random access based on the provided customer ID.
The system increments a counter for every successfully retrieved customer record.
If a random read fails for reasons other than end-of-file, the program terminates with an error.
